RuntimeConfig must use the assets section so the switch reads assets.kind.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
)

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS

//fabrik:config frontend
type AssetsConfig = assetmapper.RuntimeConfig
-- web/assets/app.css --
body {}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/assets.go:13:1: assetmapper.RuntimeConfig must be declared under //fabrik:config assets, not section "frontend"
  help: the switch is keyed by the documented assets.kind value
warning: web/assets.go:13:1: config struct RuntimeConfig is never used
  help: inject it into a provider, hook, or handler struct, or remove the directive
